subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Have mercy upon Thy servants and handmaidens, and withhold them not from the streams of Thy mercy which hath flowed from Thy Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ارحم عبادک و امائک و لاتمنعهم عن فرات رحمتک الذی جری من قلمک الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
